burialPlace.address: Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
No son named Henry.
Francis Cooke was born about 1583. His origins have not been discovered. 
http://mayflowerhistory.com/cooke-francis 

All Mayflower passengers have been thoroughly researched plus up to 5 generations of descendants. If you have different/additional information, present it to the Mayflower Society for authentication before changing the information here.

Francis Cooke set sail for America with his son John in the company of the pilgrims on the ship "Speedwell" which was forced to give up the voyage. Finally, they went on board the "Mayflower", leaving Plymouth, England, on September 6, 1620, and arriving off the New England coast on 21 November 1620. His wife Hester and three other children, Jacob, Jane, and Hester, came on the ship "Anne" in 1623. He was one of the signers of the Mayflower Compact and quite an influential member of the Plymouth Colony. He was one of the first purchasers of Dartmouth, Mass. in 1652 and of Middleborough, Mass. in 1662. He died on April 7, 1663.

zh.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke於大約1583年出生在英國。他於1603年7月20日之後與Hester Mahieu在荷蘭霍蘭萊登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他於1620年在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登被列為wool comber。他去世於1663年4月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼享年81歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯科爾斯 希爾 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke于大约1583年出生在英国。他于1603年7月20日之后与Hester Mahieu在荷兰霍蘭萊登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他于1620年在荷兰-拉藍德萊登被列为wool comber。他去世于1663年4月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼享年81岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯科爾斯 希爾 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.description: William of Orange (1533-1584), Prince of Orange (1538-1584), Count of Nassau (1559-1584), and first stadholder of the United Provinces of the Netherlands, was assassinated by Burgundian Balthasar Gerard (25) with a handgun. Philip II of Spain had called for a volunteer assassin due to William's reluctance take a public stand on religious issues. William was succeeded by his 17-year-old son, Maurice of Nassau.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.
Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke was born about 1583, in England. He married Hester Mahieu after 20 July 1603, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1620. In 1620, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as wool comber in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands. He died on 7 April 1663, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81, and was buried in Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke est né environ 1583, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Hester Mahieu après 20 juillet 1603, à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1620. En 1620, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est wool comber à Leiden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1663, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke wurde um 1583 in England geboren. Er hat nach 20. Juli 1603 in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande Hester Mahieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er ist 1620 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1620, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als wool comber in Leiden, Südholland, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. April 1663 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke è nato il circa 1583 nel England. Lui sposato Hester Mahieu dopo il 20 luglio 1603, nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Immigrato nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1620. Nel 1620, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come wool comber nel Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì il 7 aprile 1663, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Cookeは約1583年にイギリスで生まれた。1603年7月20日以後にオランダホーランドレイデンでHester Mahieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1620年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。1620年，38歳の時，オランダズイド-hオランドレイデンでの職業はwool comberと記録されている。彼は1663年4月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで81歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスコーレス ヒル ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke(은)는 대략 1583년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1603년 7월 20일 이후 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 Hester Mahieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1620년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 1620년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 wool comber이었다. 그는 1663년 4월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스 콜레스 힐 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke nasceu aproximadamente 1583, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Hester Mahieu após 20 de julho de 1603, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1620. Em 1620, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como wool comber em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1663, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke родился около 1583 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Hester Mahieu после 20 июля 1603 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он иммигрировал в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1620 году. В 1620 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии wool comber в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер 7 апреля 1663 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности колесь хилл буряль гроунд, плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Francis Cooke nació aproximadamente 1583, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Hester Mahieu después de 20 de julio de 1603, en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1620. En 1620, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era wool comber en Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Murió el 7 de abril de 1663, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
